hooks.command: cat .claude/bootstrap/BOOT.md 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; cat memory/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No daily note yet.'; echo '---'; cat memory/decisions-pending.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No pending decisions.'
echo '⚠️ COMPACTING: Write today work to memory/ before compression!'

hooks.prompt: Check if the session produced meaningful work. If so, has memory been captured (memory/ updated)? If memory was NOT captured, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "Session work not captured in memory."}. If memory was captured or no meaningful work was done, respond {"ok": true}.
